channel.title: Comments on: Delay in BATV Vlogs
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Darrin
item.dc:creator: Darrin
item.description: Love the show Paul, good luck with getting it on as a TV series! Its a great idea and hopefully all your hard work and creativity will pay off!
item.content:encoded: Love the show Paul, good luck with getting it on as a TV series! Its a great idea and hopefully all your hard work and creativity will pay off!
